name: /pr-source-remove removes the source id from the operator_namespace block in the registry
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro pr-corpus/evidence && printf 'sources: []\noperator_namespace: [{id: my-src}]\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-source-remove.sh" my-src --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml --evidence-dir pr-corpus/evidence --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && ! grep -q 'my-src' .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
